BENEFICIARIES OBJECTIONS TO TRUSTEE'S FIRST AMENDMENT TO PETN. FOR SETTL. OF FIRST ACCOUNT; IMPOSITION OF NO-CONTEST CLAUSE; VIOLATIONS OF STIPULATION; ATTORNEY'S FEES; APPROVAL OF TRUSTEE'S FEES

PETITION FOR SETTLEMENT OF FIRST ACCOUNT;IMPOSITION OF NO-CONTEST CLAUSE CONTINUED FROM NOV-14-2005 TO DEC-19-2005 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 204 ; DECLARATIONS IN RESPONSE TO THE OBJECTIONS PRESENTED. COURT: VIOLATION OF NO-CONTEST CLAUSE AND STIPULTION ARE DENIED. ISSUES ADDRESSED AND ARGUED. COURT DOES NOT WANT FURTHER BRIEFING ON THE JEEP ISSUE, THE CHARITABLE DONATION ISSUE AND THE TRANSFER ISSUE. THESE ISSUES ARE SUBMITTED. COURT WANTS DOCUMENTATION AND EXPLANATION ON THE MEDICAL EXPENSES AND DEATH EXPENSES. MR. FREEDMAN TO SERVE HIS FURTHER BRIEFING ON MR. MYERS BY 12/01/05. HE IS TO HAVE A DISCUSSION WITH MR. MYERS BEFORE FILING HIS BRIEF ON 12/08/05. HEARING IS SET ON 12/19/05. SURCHARGE ISSUES IS SUBMITTED. TRUSTEE'S FEES ARE ALLOWED PER COURT
DECLARATION OF MICHAEL E. FREEDMAN FILED BY PETITIONER MULHALL, PAULA A.
